ops.body: W1 shipped as a6b5efaa (CI green, 706 tests): constraints.cabin per-segment gate (cash exempt) + departure_days gate in rank; avoid_transit veto in compose (both sides of every boundary, turnaround exempt); _cabin_fit fixed to below-preferred-only (mixed_cabin_minutes → below_cabin_minutes — the old semantics scored HIGHER cabins as misses, which would have poisoned W2's clears guard); origins default at trips.show() with home_airport added to PREFS_FP_KEYS; layover_style/program_preference deleted; NOTABLE_PREFERENCE_STRETCH_LIMIT enforced. Three codex review rounds; accepted+fixed: airport-change transit points missed (round 1, reproduced), leg-level cabin representation blocker (round 2, reproduced: rank crashed on award-onward hybrids under a cabin constraint). REJECTED findings (for the W6 record): (1) round-2 "deleted-key grep hits remain" — the hits are the rejection tests themselves; (2) round-3 "constraint-free output not bit-identical" — the _cabin_fit semantic change is the deliberate, decided fix, not a regression. Wrapper papercut recorded: codex exec must run foreground; first W1 dispatch silently no-opped.
